ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Magno Hetruriae Duci. Possint ne Arte simplicia veraque Metalla gigni.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Alexandri Carerii Nobilis Patavini Divique Andreae Praepositi Accurata disputatio
ItacWorkItem.Notes: According to Tomasini, Elogia, Carriero delivered this lesson in the Accademia degli Animosi. See Sandra Olivieri Secchi, `Carriero, Alessandro` in DBI for a critical summary of this text.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: de` Medici,Francesco I,Grand Duke of Tuscany,

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
